question: The purpose of a house style in an organisation
options: States the topic being addressed
Remind staff of tasks or matters requiring future action
Answering, transferring and directing calls professionally
Ensures all documents follow a consistent format and appearance
answer: Ensures all documents follow a consistent format and appearance

question: A telephone operator's key responsibility
options: Answering, transferring and directing calls professionally
Ensures all documents follow a consistent format and appearance
Designing workspaces to improve comfort and reduce injury
A notice gives general information; a circular is sent to many with the same message
answer: Answering, transferring and directing calls professionally
